verdict: Reactive Cys is UNIQUE to NR4A1 (absent in NR4A2 and NR4A3). Celastrol cannot form the adduct on the paralogues → NR-V04 selectivity is, at least in part, a WARHEAD-REACTIVITY effect the noncovalent machinery cannot see. The panel MUST disentangle covalent engagement from ternary cooperativity, and the write-up must state this confound explicitly.
